meaning: n.卧车,普式火车(19世纪美国发明家George M.Pullman设计的豪华型列车车厢,常用为特等客车)
examples: Give me one Pullman ticket to Chicago, please.
I want to change this ticket to a Pullman ticket.
As for Pullman, he confidently expects to be back in the top 10 next year.
Other authors who'll get the Tesco treatment are Judy Blume, Philip Pullman and crime-writer Karen Slaughter.
Mr Pullman criticised the proposals and told the BBC that trained librarians "could not be replaced".
